summary: Custom Orders feature testing completed successfully. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified tabs, search, view modal, and create quote flow work correctly.

backend_api_tests.test_01_create_custom_order_returns_orde: PASS - Order ID returned in CUS-YYYYMMDD-HHMM format
backend_api_tests.test_02_admin_enquiries_returns_counts: PASS - Returns counts for all/custom_order/general tabs
backend_api_tests.test_04_search_by_customer_name: PASS - Search by customer name works
backend_api_tests.test_05_filter_by_enquiry_type_custom_or: PASS - Filter returns only custom_order type
backend_api_tests.test_06_filter_by_enquiry_type_general: PASS - Filter returns only general type
backend_api_tests.test_07_create_full_quote_from_enquiry: PASS - Creates linked quote, updates status to 'Quote Created'

frontend_ui_tests.tabs_with_counts: PASS - All Enquiries (14), Custom Orders (7), General Enquiries (7)
frontend_ui_tests.search_functionality: PASS - Search by Order ID, name, phone, email works
frontend_ui_tests.view_modal: PASS - Shows Customer Information, Order Specifications, Sizes Breakdown, Design Details
frontend_ui_tests.create_quote_modal: PASS - Auto-fills customer details, calculates total price
frontend_ui_tests.custom_order_confirmation_page: PASS - Correctly displays order_id from state

verified_features.enquiry_storage: All required fields stored: customer info, product details, sizes, notes, files
verified_features.admin_tabs: All Enquiries, Custom Orders, General Enquiries with counts
verified_features.search: Case-insensitive partial match on Order ID, name, phone, email
verified_features.view_modal: Shows all enquiry details including sizes breakdown
verified_features.create_quote_flow: Creates linked quote in manual_quotes collection, updates enquiry status
verified_features.confirmation_page: Shows order_id to guest after submission
verified_features.confirmation_email: Sent to customer with order_id (EMAIL_MOCK=false in .env)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor ESLint warning in AdminEnquiriesPage.js: useEffect missing 'loadEnquiries' dependency - not critical but should be fixed
seed_data_creation: Test enquiries with TEST_ prefix created during testing. 7 custom orders visible in admin panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom Orders feature is fully implemented and tested. Order IDs use CUS-YYYYMMDD-HHMM format. Admin can view enquiries with tabs (All/Custom Orders/General), search by multiple fields, view details in modal, and create linked quotes. Guest confirmation page shows order_id. Confirmation emails are sent (EMAIL_MOCK=false).
